jsonLd.title: Porter is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
